## Why?
<!-- The motivation. What problem does this solve? -->

## How did you test it?
<!-- The steps you ran to verify the change works. Include screenshots if UI. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Runs without errors on Windows 11 (24H2 or later)
- [ ] No new external dependencies (we keep the footprint small)
- [ ] No changes to telemetry / network calls beyond what's in PRIVACY.md
- [ ] Settings persist correctly after restart
- [ ] If new strings: added to all 8 language tables in `taskbar_widget.py`
